title: British Columbia Programme Monthly Trend Sheet - October 2025
content:
• Year-to-year credit prices fell by 25.50%, dropping from $308.46 in October 2024 to $229.80 in October 2025. Average price for this year stands at $259.33, roughly a fall of 37.81% as compared to last year's average price of $417.88.Year-to-date credit volumes for 2025 increased by about 27.51%, and are currently at 1,275,256 compared to 1,000,149 in 2024. Credit Volumes in October 2025 saw a significant increase of 572.74% as compared to September 2025, with volumes rising from 11,973 in September 2025 to 80,547 in October 2025. This month witnessed the average ticket size of 16,109.4 volume per transfer, based on 5 transfers.
  • In October 2025, credit prices in BC LCFS rose by 2.21% month-on-month (MoM), rising from $224.83 in September to $229.80 in October.
  • Year-to-year credit prices fell by 25.50%, dropping from $308.46 in October 2024 to $229.80 in October 2025. Average price for this year stands at $259.33, roughly a fall of 37.81% as compared to last year's average price of $417.88.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
